intro: Acorus calamus decoction, also known as Indian sarsaparilla or valerian root, is a traditional herbal remedy used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and anxiety. The decoction is prepared by steeping the dried root of the Acorus calamus plant in hot water, releasing its bioactive compounds, including volatile oils and sesquiterpenes. Regular consumption of Acorus calamus decoction may help to calm the mind and body, inducing a restful and rejuvenating sleep.
